name: bitwarden
title: Bitwarden
description: Keyboard-driven access to your Bitwarden vault. Search and copy passwords, usernames, and TOTP codes directly from the launcher.
author: edmogeor

preferences.name: serverRegion
preferences.title: Server Region
preferences.description: The Bitwarden instance your vault lives on

preferences.name: customServerUrl
preferences.title: Custom Server URL
preferences.description: Required when Server Region is set to Self-hosted. Example: https://vault.example.com

preferences.name: apiClientId
preferences.title: API Client ID
preferences.description: Your personal API key client_id from the Bitwarden web vault (Settings → Security → View API key)

preferences.name: apiClientSecret
preferences.title: API Client Secret
preferences.description: Your personal API key client_secret from the Bitwarden web vault

preferences.name: passwordLength
preferences.title: Password Length
preferences.description: Number of characters for generated passwords

preferences.name: passwordUppercase
preferences.title: Include Uppercase (A-Z)
preferences.description: Add uppercase letters to generated passwords
preferences.label: Enabled

preferences.name: passwordLowercase
preferences.title: Include Lowercase (a-z)
preferences.description: Add lowercase letters to generated passwords
preferences.label: Enabled

preferences.name: passwordSymbols
preferences.title: Include Symbols (!@#$)
preferences.description: Add special characters to generated passwords
preferences.label: Enabled

commands.name: search-vault
commands.title: Search Vault
commands.description: Search your Bitwarden vault and copy credentials

commands.name: create-item
commands.title: Create Item
commands.description: Add a new Login, Card, Identity, or Secure Note to your vault

commands.name: logout
commands.title: Log Out
commands.description: Log out of Bitwarden, clearing your stored API key session
